solution.title: Save hours researching your leads. Vendrix Lead Investigator does it for you!
solution.subtitle: Sellers who know who is on the other side create more connection and conversion!
benefits: Approach clients with much more context
Sell with more confidence and professionalism

items.question: What is Vendrix?
items.answer: Vendrix is a company that believes AI can accelerate sales performance and business outcomes.

items.question: How do I access Lead Investigator?
items.answer: You can access it through WhatsApp or desktop with a fast and intuitive experience.

items.question: Does it work for B2B and B2C?
items.answer: Yes, it is designed to support sales teams across multiple go-to-market models.

items.question: Is there a trial period?
items.answer: Yes, you can start and explore core features before scaling up.

items.question: Can I change plans later?
items.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade as your sales operation grows.

cta.title: Which lead are we investigating today?
